title: solenostemon thyrsiflorus
intro: Solenostemon thyrsiflorus, also known as Coleus forskohlii, is a tropical plant native to Africa and Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant's roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antidiabetic effects. The health benefits of Solenostemon thyrsiflorus include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in weight loss, among others. Traditionally, the plant's roots are used to prepare herbal extracts, which are then processed into capsules, tablets, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
